positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for simple_test.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for simple_test.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (human(X0) => mortal(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. human(socrates) [input(axiom)]
3. mortal(socrates) [input(conjecture)]
4. ~mortal(socrates) [negated conjecture 3]
5. ~mortal(socrates) [flattening 4]
6. ! [X0] : (mortal(X0) | ~human(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
7. ~human(X0) | mortal(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
8. human(socrates) [cnf transformation 2]
9. ~mortal(socrates) [cnf transformation 5]
10. mortal(socrates) [resolution 7,8]
11. $false [forward subsumption resolution 10,9]
% SZS output end Proof for simple_test.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
